---
format: html
---

:::{.callout-tip icon=false}

## About this course

This is a session from our [introductory data skills course](data_intro.html). That course is a multi-part introduction to data work designed for health and care staff. It assumes no prior knowledge of data work or statistics, and aims to help you build skills that are closely-aligned to your work. 

The sessions run as live interactive Teams meetings, and are intended to be taken in order. Please make sure you're booked on the appropriate sessions - you can find information about currently-timetabled courses on [our schedule page](https://nes-dew.github.io/KIND-training/schedule.html).

Some of the sessions use simple pieces of example work in Excel to demonstrate key concepts, so you will need very basic Excel skills to get the most from this course. We run a [multi-session beginner's Excel course](https://nes-dew.github.io/KIND-training/excel_main.html) which would be more than enough to prepare you for what you'd need here.

:::
